user.title: JMA Nowcast Setup
user.description:
Set up Japan Meteorological Agency High-Resolution Precipitation Nowcast.
Drag the map marker to set the monitoring location and drag the circle edge to set the radius.
Defaults to your HA home location with a 1 km radius.

data_description.location: Use the map marker as the monitoring point and the circle radius as the area
data_description.forecast_minutes: Select one or more future time windows to check (up to 60 min ahead)
data_description.threshold_mm: Rainfall intensity at or above this value counts as rain. 1.0=light, 5.0=moderate
data_description.trigger_coverage: How much of the area inside the radius must exceed the threshold to trigger
data_description.no_rain_cooldown_min: If an alert fires but no actual rain is observed, return to ready after this many minutes (0 = legacy behavior)
data_description.post_rain_cooldown_min: Wait this many minutes after observed rain ends before the next alert is allowed (0 = legacy behavior)
data_description.scan_interval: JMA Nowcast updates every 5 minutes, so 5 min is recommended

init.title: JMA Nowcast Settings
init.description: Adjust monitoring location, radius, trigger conditions, and cooldowns. Enable "Reset to HA home" to discard the current map values and revert to HA home with a 1 km radius on save.

data_description.location: Use the map marker as the monitoring point and the circle radius as the area
data_description.reset_to_home: If enabled when saving, ignores the map and reverts to HA home with a 1 km radius
data_description.forecast_minutes: Select one or more future time windows to check (up to 60 min ahead)
data_description.threshold_mm: Rainfall intensity at or above this value counts as rain. 1.0=light, 5.0=moderate
data_description.trigger_coverage: How much of the area inside the radius must exceed the threshold to trigger
data_description.no_rain_cooldown_min: If an alert fires but no actual rain is observed, return to ready after this many minutes (0 = immediate)
data_description.post_rain_cooldown_min: Wait this many minutes after observed rain ends before the next alert is allowed (0 = immediate)
data_description.scan_interval: JMA Nowcast updates every 5 minutes, so 5 min is recommended
